item.tutm.debug: Some Kind of Awesome Debug Rectangle
item.tutm.night_victory_emblem: Emblem of Eternal Night and Victor
item.tutm.infinite_time_clock: Minute Hand of Time, Hour Hand of Space
item.tutm.time_sand_dust.desc: A tiny grain of sand imbued with time, still attempting to fall into the abyss.
item.tutm.time_sand.desc: Sand imbued with even more time, yet still only a fraction of a greater power.
item.tutm.infinite_time_clock.desc: A massive power containing one of the authorities wielded by the Time Manager.
item.tutm.chronos_gods_time_frame: Exquisite Gear of the God Chronos
item.tutm.chronos_gods_time_frame.desc: One of the lost supreme gears. No one knows why it was found in her ruined home, how this house came to be here, or what happened to her.
tooltip.tutm.hold_shift: §8Hold [SHIFT] to gaze into the Abyss of Time
tooltip.time_halo.lore_base.1: §d§l§nAn ethereal golden halo that governs all living moments and draws the fate of all things into a circle.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.1: §5§oIn the §k§fTorrent§r§5§o of time, there is no nobility in §lbeginning or end§r§5§o; accumulated power and prosperity are but mere fragments of §6§lhistory§r§5§o.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.2: §5§oBefore the heartless §6§lSands of Time§r§5§o, both §e§nkings§r§5§o and §7§nslaves§r§5§o shall equally kneel.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.3: §5§oAccumulated history will eventually erase itself under its own weight, and all shall return to the "§f§lFather Desert§r§5§o." Such is the §4§lEternal Law§r§5§o imposed upon those granted life, an inescapable brand of the end.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.4: §5§oOne who once grasped the §e§lSupreme Status§r§5§o, but was driven mad by the whispers of a cruel prophecy, engraved an §0§lInerasable Brand of Despair§r§5§o upon this halo.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.5: §5§oChildren gathered at the feet of God utter a §d§ncurse-like blessing§r§5§o: "For you, we shall prophesy the §cbeginning of death§r§5§o and the §bend of life§r§5§o."
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.6: §5§oThe Arbiter of the Beginning declares: "I yield to no life or death; I am the §e§lLast Second Hand§r§5§o that watches the end of the world in §8§lsolitude§r§5§o."
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.7: §5§oEven if all is scorched by §4§lEternal Hellfire§r§5§o and bursts like §f§oBubbles§r§5§o, the §6§lCircle shall close§r§5§o, and "Our Era" will return one day. Even if it is a §0§l§nDawn of Despair§r§5§o beyond the sacrifice of our deaths.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.8: §5§oFear not. The hellfire that judges us, and the bubbles that vanish in an instant, are but a "§4Death§r§5§o" smaller than a handful of sand in §e§lEverlasting Time§r§5§o. There is no need to fear the beginning of death or the end of life.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.9: §5§oWhen all ends, you will remember. The ecstasy of the moment your soul is weighed equally and dissolves as §b§la single drop§r§5§o into §9§lEternal Stillness§r§5§o.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.11: §0§lWe were betrayed and reached §k§8The Total End§r§0§l.
tooltip.time_halo.lore_deep.12: §0§l"§k§8Our Era§r§0§l" was buried beneath the §lLord of the Abyss§r§0§l.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.2: §8§oYou have been recognized by the §b§lLord of the Abyss§r§8§o; no entity shall ever view you with hostility.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.4: §8§o§e§lTime Acceleration§r§8§o can be increased up to §c§l20x§r§8§o.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.5: §8§oYou will be strengthened by the §b§npassage of time§r§8§o.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.6: §8§oYour Attack Damage is currently boosted by §l§b%s%%§r§8.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.9: §8§oAll §d§nStatus Ailments§r§8§o fall away from your time, leaving not a single drop.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.11: §8§oYou can §9§lfix space§r§8§o and look down upon the world.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.12: §8§oAll attacks have §e§l10 hitboxes§r§8§o worth of impact.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.16: §8§oA following §b§lLaser§r§8§o is fired with every attack.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.18: §8§oBy the §5§lPower of the Abyss§r§8§o, you steal the target's time-related abilities upon being hit.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.19: §8§oWhen you approach §c§ldeath§r§8§o, §e§lTime Reverses§r§8§o, restoring your HP and Hunger to maximum.
tooltip.time_halo.ability.20: §8§oEverything eventually returns to sand, but you have gained the §6§l§nsole right to turn the hourglass§r§8§o.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_time.desc: §8§oTime, bubbles, purgatory... all are one, connected to the final causality.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_nether.desc: §8§oAt the end, there was a bubble and one who held its power, offering their soul to the abyss.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_end.desc: §8§o"Throw it into the end of time and the beginning of its causality, then the path shall open."
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_charge.desc: §8§oThe Apostle said, "That clock should be cast away into the heights of purgatory."
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_time: The Final Moon Clock forged by the power of time-sand, transient bubbles, and hellfire.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_nether: The Final Moon Clock forged by the flames of purgatory.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_end: The Final Moon Clock forged by transient bubbles and the flames of purgatory.
tooltip.tutm.hint.zombie: §7On the night of the full moon, return the starving mass of flesh to the sand.
tooltip.tutm.hint.skeleton: §7Under the waning moon, silence the resonance of hollow bones echoing in the void.
tooltip.tutm.hint.spider: §7Drag the creeping multi-eyed shadow into its own web.
tooltip.tutm.hint.creeper: §7Crush the swelling pulse of ruin with silent moonlight.
tooltip.tutm.hint.witch: §7Erase the one who carries bottles of poison and hexes with an abyssal concoction.
tooltip.tutm.hint.enderman: §7Banish the dark shadow wandering between dimensions to the far side of the boundary.
tooltip.tutm.hint.phantom: §7Quiet the screams of the specters dancing in the night sky beyond time.
tooltip.tutm.hint.wither_skeleton: §7Shatter the dark bone judge in the abyss of the new moon.
tooltip.tutm.all_parts_gathered: §0My child, the time has come to reassemble the fragmented powers.
tooltip.tutm.lightning_hint_header: §0§k Devote yourself to the abyss, and then...
tooltip.tutm.lightning_hint_desc: Offer yourself and the clock to the wrath of heaven at a moment equal to the abyss of this world.
chat.tutm.message.2: §8You have done well to repel the eternal darkness.
chat.tutm.message.3: §6A new part has been etched into the clock...
item.tutm.absolute_chronos_clock.desc: §0Hold this in your hand and overcome the final trial, transcend the deep abyss, and accept your fate.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_time.desc.3: §8§oMix the soul of the black cat, symbol of death, with the soul of the liquid creature, symbol of life.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_time.desc.2: §8§oIt is said that the true hero protected the village amidst the eternal darkness.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_time.desc.4: §8§oFind the sacred relics left by the gods.
item.tutm.lunar_chrono_clock_time.desc.5: §8§oCombine the sacred fragments to attain the final divinity; §0§kit is the final trial§r.
death.attack.tutm.time: %1$s's time was carved away and rendered as if it never existed.
death.attack.tutm.time.player: %1$s's time was carved away by %2$s and rendered as if it never existed.
death.attack.tutm.laser: %1$s's time was carved away and rendered as if it never existed.
death.attack.tutm.laser.player: %1$s's time was carved away by %2$s and rendered as if it never existed.
